subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — I appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

I'm happy to schedule an introductory call. Please find my available slots below; all times are in UTC:

  — Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
  — Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
  — Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share personal or internal contact information, as these are typically reached through official company channels. I'm happy to facilitate any introductions through appropriate routes once we connect.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards
